reason: Successfully navigated to the agent, verified status, sent a message, and confirmed the agent responded with the correct answer.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — App loaded successfully showing the home page with two agents listed: "QA-20260702-003626-xnwj" and "QA-20260702-003625-9gs9", both with "idle" status.

Clicked on agent "QA-20260702-003625-9gs9" in the sidebar — Successfully opened the agent page. The URL changed to /agents/qa-20260702-003625-9gs9-ww8bbyh75u and the page title became "QA-20260702-003625-9gs9 · Gamut".
Verified agent status — Agent status indicator clearly showed "idle" at the top right of the page.
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the input field — Message was successfully entered in the message input box with placeholder text "How can I help? Press cmd+enter to send".

Clicked the Send button — Message was sent successfully. The page navigated to the session page with URL /agents/qa-20260702-003625-9gs9-ww8bbyh75u/sessions/a8495a61-4411-4c32-9d02-e3b00baccde4 and the session was automatically named "Basic Math Question Session".
Waited for response with "Working..." indicator — Agent processed the message and returned a response within 1 second (much faster than the 3-minute timeout).
Verified response mentions "4" — The agent responded with the correct answer "4" to the math question "What is 2+2?". The response is clearly visible in the chat with "Worked for 1s" shown below it.
Took final screenshot showing the conversation — Screenshot captured showing my message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and the agent's correct response "4" with status "idle" in the top right corner.
